constitutional_anchor: clause 6.G clause 5 + Sixth Law clause 5 + Seventh Law clause 3 + plan/2026-05-04-pending-completion-plan.md Phase 1.1

attestation.host_emulator_run_note: First single-AVD rehearsal on bare host; clause 6.I container-bound run scheduled for the next phase that touches the matrix gate.

what_the_test_proved_on_real_device: Onboarding flow → Internet Archive → Continue tap reached the post-onboarding main app on a real Android 14 emulator
AuthServiceImpl.signalAuthorized was invoked during the Continue tap (the recorded SignaledAuthState was non-null after the flow)
PreferencesStorageImpl.saveSignaledAuthState wrote to disk — the persisted name contained 'Internet Archive' as expected from `Anonymous (${displayName})`
AuthServiceImpl.logout cleared the persisted state on disk — post-logout getSignaledAuthState() returned null
Phase 1.1 production-stack guarantee for force-stop survival is verified end-to-end on a real device for the persistence-write path

incident_during_run.discovered_bug: submodules/containers/pkg/emulator/android.go::WaitForBoot called `adb connect localhost:<port>` ONCE before the poll loop. On cold boot the ADB socket takes 30-60s to become ready, so the connect failed silently and every subsequent `adb -s localhost:<port>` poll returned 'device not found' — making the matrix runner time out at 5m0s and again at 10m0s while the emulator was actually fully booted.
incident_during_run.fix_commit: submodules/containers commit 2f3c689 — retry adb connect inside the poll loop (idempotent on already-connected; resolves on first iteration after the ADB socket comes up).
incident_during_run.falsifiability_rehearsed: yes — pre-fix run: 2x boot-timeout failures (5m + 10m). Post-fix run: pass in 65s. Evidence at .lava-ci-evidence/2026-05-04-evening-c00-cz_api34{,-retry,-fix}/.
incident_during_run.constitutional_classification: clause 6.A real-binary contract bug — script's expectation of the adb binary did not match the binary's reality.

deep_coverage_owed: Container-bound matrix run per clause 6.I clause 1 (next phase that touches the matrix gate)
Multi-AVD coverage per clause 6.I clauses 2 + 3 (CZ_API28 + CZ_API30 + CZ_API34 + Pixel_9a + tablet form factor)
True `am force-stop` survival via UiAutomator-driven shell access (Phase 1.1.7 owed pending in-process kill workaround)
